home.title: Patapam Coding
home.subtitle: Learn to code while having fun!
home.complete_previous: Complete the previous step to unlock!

game.mollasson_done:
Mollasson has nothing more to teach you!
Do you want to play with Tartuffe now?

tuto1.title: Straight ahead!
tuto1.description: Help Mollasson slide down the branch to the end.

tuto2.title: The bend
tuto2.description: The branch turns! Mollasson must go down then right.

tuto3.title: Two turns
tuto3.description: Two turns for Mollasson — down, right, down!

tuto4.title: Obstacles!
tuto4.description: Leaves and knots block the path! Find the right route.

tuto5.title: Against the flow
tuto5.description: Sometimes you have to go left to move forward! Help Mollasson find the way.

tuto6.title: The secret key
tuto6.description: The door is locked! Find the hidden key before reaching the exit.

tartuffe1.title: The snowy forest
tartuffe1.description: Two locks on the path! Find both keys to clear the way.

dauphinou1.title: Swim with Dauphinou
dauphinou1.description: One action is missing to cross the sea. Do you know which one?

dauphinou2.title: The first obstacle
dauphinou2.description: A rock blocks the surface. Jump over it and dive back!

dauphinou3.title: The palm tree
dauphinou3.description: A big palm tree on its island is blocking the path. Dive, pass underneath, then jump back up!

dauphinou4.title: Rock and palm tree
dauphinou4.description: First a rock, then an island with a palm tree. Jump over one, dive under the other!
